  1. handlers

Uses of Package
handlers

Packages that use handlers
Package
Description
Controllers
 
handlers
 
  • Classes in handlers used by Controllers
    Class
    Description
    ClientHandler
    ClientHandler manages communication with the server for all client operations.
  • Classes in handlers used by handlers
    Class
    Description
    ClientHandler
    ClientHandler manages communication with the server for all client operations.
    ReportHandler
    Handles server responses related to reports and updates JavaFX charts in the ReportController with the received data.
    ResponseHandler
    Represents a handler for processing server responses.
